Test-Out Progress
0%

Good evening, and, Welcome to my Wheelhouse!

You can learn a lot here. It’s meant to build skillsets and relationships in the process, if possible. Browse bundles for groups, pairs, or, if it’s just you, and you can only invest your time — I’m glad that you’re here. And, I have big plans for you to be successful. Please let me know how I can move you forward with learning Food & Beverage.

— Mark Lenington
Certified Sommelier · Founder of LearnSomm.com and LearnComida.com

Tasting Journal
Captured from wheel:
Click descriptors on the wheel to add them.
The full Level 2 and Level 3 grids unlock at Next Level and Master. Start with Telling the Story.
Tell the story of this wine

Describe it in your own words — what you see, smell, and taste. We'll listen for the key elements and score against the intro guidelines. No grid, no cheat sheet.

Your Somm Emoji
🍷
Learn together

Build your challenge

Take on a group challenge — learn while building relationships. Answer a few quick questions and we'll price it.

1 · Who's learning?
2 · What do you want to learn?
e.g. “My friend and I want to learn Sake & Sushi before Japan.”
3 · What's your runway?
4 · How hard do you want it?
5 · Make it fit you (optional)
Something else you need? — we'd rather hear it than have anything feel like too much.
Got it — thank you. We read every one of these.

    Tip the Somm

    Pour a little back into the bar.

    The programs and bundles are how the lights stay on — and there's a free Learning Quest for anyone who'd rather earn their way in. A tip is just a thank-you on top, never a toll. Here's what it fuels:

    💡
    If something here helpedLearning that sticks is worth a little something. Tips keep the wheels turning and the suite growing.
    🗺️
    Keep the free path openThe Learning Quest lets anyone earn their wheels by studying — your tip helps keep that door unlocked for folks who can't pay.
    🌿
    A seat at the bar for everyoneWe actively reach out to and welcome programs supporting people who are rebuilding, renewing, or exploring the craft alcohol-free — beverage knowledge and great mocktails belong to everyone. Your tip helps us keep those doors wide open.
    🔧
    Fuel what's nextNew wheels, deeper Intro→Certified→Master levels, more languages. Tips go straight into the build.
    🤝
    Back an independent projectBuilt by a working somm, not a boardroom. Your support funds the work, not investors.
    🎡
    Keep the wheel turningEvery tip keeps the suite growing and the wheels spinning for the next person on the floor.
    Leave a tip 🍷

    Always optional. Thanks for spending a shift with us.

    ⚡
